frontmatter.title: Nette Tester plugin for PhpStorm: 2.0.0 and beyond
frontmatter.perex: A few minutes ago, I have released a total rework of my intellij-nette-tester plugin that integrates Nette Tester into PhpStorm.

frontmatter.title: Signing commits in PhpStorm on OS X
frontmatter.perex: If you host your repositories on Github, you have probably noticed they started verifying GPG signatures back in April. After half a day of pain, googling and experimenting, I came up with this definitive guide on how to set this up in PhpStorm on OS X.
